description: An immutable event record representing the sale of a fraction of an activity claim. Multiple sale events are aggregated to compute the current funding state of a claim. This record is only to be trusted if created by a trusted verifier handle.

main.description: A single, immutable sale event for a fraction of an activity claim. Records the buyer, amount, and a reference to the funding receipt that proves the transaction.

activityClaimUri.description: The AT-URI of the activity claim that this sale event is associated with.

buyer.description: The DID of the buyer. Omit this field if the buyer wishes to remain anonymous.

amount.description: The amount paid for this fraction as a numeric string (e.g. '1000.50').

currency.description: The fiat currency of the payment (e.g. USD, EUR).

receipt.description: The AT-URI of the org.hypercerts.funding.receipt record that proves this sale transaction.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
